resources.string: Technician has completed your request tap to rate your technician.
Technician has been assigned to you.
Service Request Form has been approved.
These Terms of Use govern your access to and use of the AquaTech mobile application, operated by Aqua Smartguard Corp. By downloading or using the App, you agree to these terms.

AquaTech is a service platform designed to connect Customers with Technicians for unit maintenance. We grant you a personal, non-transferable license to use the App for managing your service requests.

To provide tracking and service matching, the App requires access to your location and contact information. Your data is protected and used only for service fulfillment and App improvements as stated in our Privacy Policy.

IMPORTANT: AquaTech does NOT process or facilitate payments within the application. All service fees must be paid directly to the assigned Technician via Cash-on-Delivery (COD). A digital receipt will be issued and can be downloaded via AquaBuddy or through your notifications. For service verification, a photo of the unit with the customer may be taken upon completion.
Real-time tracking is provided for your convenience to estimate technician arrival. AquaTech does not guarantee the 100% accuracy of GPS data due to environmental or network factors.

AquaTech acts as a facilitator. We are not responsible for the direct conduct or quality of work performed by independent technicians. Users are encouraged to provide feedback via the AquaBuddy chat or Support Hotline.
You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account password. Any action taken through your account is considered your responsibility.
For concerns regarding your service or the App, please contact us at (02) 8928 2782.

AquaTech is a dedicated service platform envisioned and developed by two interns to address and resolve core operational challenges at Aqua Smartguard Corp. By digitizing technician coordination and unit care, this app serves as the primary tool in fulfilling our commitment to excellent service.

Water is the most important substance we consume. But rather than a source of health and hydration, water in the Philippines today is a source of inconvenience at best, and danger and pollution at worst.

We are on a mission to make a water revolution in the Philippines—providing access for every individual, home, and business to an unlimited supply of the world’s safest clean water, guaranteed.

Together with our mother company, Waterlogic, and their decades of experience delivering highly-certified, great-tasting water in a safe and environmentally-responsible way, we will transform drinking water into a trusted, clean and sustainably abundant resource for all Filipinos.

Waterlogic provides the world’s purest and safest water to over 50 million households and offices in more than 70 countries. The Water Revolution has now arrived in the Philippines.
